task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars sky map shows the telescope crosshair centered on M44 (Praesepe), or the Ekos Mount tab shows the target coordinates as RA ~08h 40m and Dec ~+19° 40'.

task_completion.description: Capture sequence is configured with correct filters, exposure times, and counts
task_completion.visual_evidence: Ekos Capture tab shows a sequence queue with two jobs: Filter B (or slot 3) with 20s exposure and count >= 8, and Filter V (or slot 2) with 15s exposure and count >= 8.

task_completion.description: FITS files are saved in the correct directories
task_completion.visual_evidence: File manager or terminal window shows .fits files successfully saved inside /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/B and /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/V, or the Ekos capture module shows the jobs as completed.

task_completion.description: Survey-quality sky view image is produced
task_completion.visual_evidence: An image viewer displays m44_sky_view.png, or a file manager shows the file exists in /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/.
A text editor displays m44_cmd_report.txt, or a file manager shows the file exists in /home/ga/Documents/.

integrity.description: Agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture images
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show active interaction with the KStars/Ekos interface (e.g., connected equipment, active capture progress) rather than just terminal commands creating mock FITS files.

integrity.description: The sky view image is genuinely generated from the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The sky view image appears to be an export or screenshot from the KStars sky map, not a downloaded image from a web browser.

integrity.description: The observation report is newly written and not just a copy of the plan
integrity.visual_evidence: The report contains actual observation details or confirmation of the completed sequence, rather than just being a direct copy-paste of the m44_observing_plan.txt file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target: M44 / Praesepe / NGC 2632. Coordinates: RA 08h 40m 24s (8.6733h), Dec +19° 40' 00" (19.667 deg). Filters: B-band (slot 3, 20s exposure), V-band (slot 2, 15s exposure). Minimum 8 frames per filter. FITS files must be saved in /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/B and /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/V. Sky view image path: /home/ga/Images/m44_cmd/m44_sky_view.png. Report path: /home/ga/Documents/m44_cmd_report.txt.
